source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Quickdraw
upgrades.description: Attacks faster the further Bloons are from Desperado.

upgrades.name: Standoff
upgrades.description: Attacks faster the fewer Bloons are in range.

upgrades.name: Big Iron
upgrades.description: Upgrades pistol to a 6-shot revolver. Attacks even faster the fewer Bloons are in range.

upgrades.name: The Blazing Sun
upgrades.description: They say Desperado shoots so fast them revolvers catch alight.

upgrades.name: Bullseye
upgrades.description: Shots get a chance to Crit. Chance to Crit goes up when target Bloon is further away.

upgrades.name: Deadeye
upgrades.description: Take Aim ability: target Monkey gains improved range, accuracy, and Camo detection. Desperado gains a long range rifle to use against distant targets. Rifle shots excel against Fortified targets and can pop Lead Bloons.

upgrades.name: Bounty Hunter
upgrades.description: Marked to Pop ability: Marks extra Bloons, then proceeds to attack all Marked Bloons. Marked Bloons take more damage and give more cash. All Desperados can target Marked Bloons.

upgrades.name: Golden Justice
upgrades.description: They say Desperado's longarm can hit clean through an army of Bloons.

upgrades.name: Wanderer
upgrades.description: A Wanderer works best alone. Desperado attacks much faster, but less so when more Monkeys are in each weapon's attack range.

upgrades.name: Nomad
upgrades.description: Attacks faster the more Bloons are in range. When lives are lost gets temporary range and attack speed increase, plus a small amount of cash if a Bloon leaked.

upgrades.name: Enforcer
upgrades.description: Uses a shotgun that can knock back Bloons when they get within close range.

upgrades.name: Avenger
upgrades.description: Shotgun hits release shrapnel and can even knock back MOABs. When lives are lost, weaker Bloons only take 1 life each for a short time.

upgrades.name: The Desert Phantom
upgrades.description: They say Desperado hits so hard it's like a mine blast.
